Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY OF PITTSBURGH'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is granted. There is a liberal policy in favor of amendment and the amendments do not change the tenor of the case. The prejudice to defendant from the amendment is minimal. The prevailing is to provide a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Motion To Stay The Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRYAN A. McBURNEY OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 986-5900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAUREN M. BOLFANGO OF BOLFANGO & McKOWN LLP, TEL. NO. 946-4015 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HELEN NGUYEN'S Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Motion To Stay The Proceedings is Denied. The Court notes that a First Amended Complaint was filed after the Petition to Compel Arbitration was filed. Because the First Amended Complaint is substantially similar to the original complaint, the Court will rule on the merits of the Petition, rather than take the Petition off calendar as moot. The Arbitration Agreement, read as a whole, only applies to disputes relating to the terms and conditions of Defendant's employment. Plaintiff's causes of action for fraud, unjust enrichment, conversion, and alter ego do not relate to the terms and conditions of Defendant's employment and therefore the Arbitration Agreement does not apply.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Continued To Jun-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
